title: Customer Interview Guide
shortDescription: Design a structured customer interview — screening criteria, question script, and synthesis template.
jobsToBeDone: Create a synthesis template for findings

inputs.label: Research Objective
inputs.example: Understand why power users downgrade to free tier after trial

inputs.label: Target Participant Profile
inputs.example: Users who trialed Team plan for 14+ days but did not convert

inputs.label: Key Themes to Explore
inputs.example: Perceived value, collaboration friction, pricing sensitivity, alternative tools
